cases.problem_text:
Title: Beyond the Palindrome (Hard Version)
Task: For a binary string r, define f(r) by repeatedly deleting all substrings "10" simultaneously until no "10" remains. A binary string s is called almost-palindrome iff f(s)=f(rev(s)). Given n, count the number of distinct binary strings of length n that are almost-palindrome, modulo 998244353.
Input: The first line contains an integer t. Each of the next t lines contains one integer n.
Output: For each test case, output one integer: the number of almost-palindrome binary strings of length n modulo 998244353.
